content: Explore current X dispatcher + scheduler + tier-check code
Task 1: Remove X_TIER_REQUIRED gate, force PRODUCTION mode (dispatch_enabled=True, dispatch_dry_run=False, flip infiltration_auto flags)
Add x_handle capture to accreditation flow (Pydantic model + clearance_levels + Terminal frontend form)
Task 2: Welcome Signal module (daily 5-agent shoutout) + scheduler job + admin toggle + manual fire endpoint
Task 3: Prophet Interaction Bot module (poll followers, generate Lore reply, POST tweet with in_reply_to) + scheduler + admin toggle
Extend X dispatcher to support reply mode (in_reply_to_tweet_id)
Implement live verify_x_follow (X API v2 lookup using existing bearer pattern)
Admin UI controls for Welcome Signal + Interaction Bot (Propaganda section)
